blocks.text: Meta Quest Link is a feature built into the Quest that allows you to use your Quest as a PC VR headset while wired into a VR-ready PC.

blocks.name: Can I play any VR game?
blocks.value: You can generally play any Meta PC or SteamVR title while on Link, as long as your PC is capable of running it.

blocks.name: What's required?
blocks.value:
You need a VR-ready PC that meets the minimum specs (you can find out more details [here](https://www.meta.com/help/quest/140991407990979/)), as well as a USB 3.0 A-to-C or C-to-C cable.
You can find more info about this with /linkcables.
